description_long: This humanoid robot features a cylindrical head with two prominent, round eyes set into a weathered, metallic faceplate. Its torso is broad and angular, with layered armor-like plating in a rusty brown and dark gray color scheme, giving it a rugged, industrial appearance. The arms and legs are constructed from segmented rods and joints, with visible bolts and mechanical connectors, suggesting a high degree of articulation. The hands and feet are simple, with the hands ending in small, rounded tips and the feet in flat, rectangular bases. The back of the robot displays additional mechanical detailing, including a raised panel and what appears to be a small exhaust or sensor unit. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed joints and a robust build suitable for urban environments.
description: A rugged, industrial humanoid robot with a cylindrical head, broad armored torso, and segmented, jointed limbs in rusty brown and dark gray metal.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical head with two round eyes, broad chest plating, and symmetrical, jointed arms and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the torso, the protruding back panel, and the mechanical structure of the limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back panel, additional mechanical detailing, and the symmetrical alignment of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the head, torso, and limb articulation.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms hanging straight down at the sides and legs straight, head facing forward, and torso aligned vertically.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated metal panels and mechanical components with no decorative coverings.
attribute_facial_features: Face features two round, glassy eyes set into a cylindrical head; no visible mouth, nose, or expressive elements.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, allowing for a wide range of motion; limbs appear rigid but highly articulated.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Two forward-facing optical sensors (eyes) on the head; possible sensor or exhaust unit on the back.
